title: Tackle4826 Painting meme
description: Replace all Minecraft paintings with legendary Tackle4826 memes. Pure chaos, pure fun.
body:
# 🖼️ Tackle4826 Painting Meme Pack

Are you tired of the same old boring Minecraft paintings? Now you can decorate your walls with **the legendary memes of Tackle4826!**

This resource pack replaces every Minecraft painting with funny, chaotic, and unforgettable Tackle4826 faces. Perfect for meme bases, funny servers, or just to make your friends laugh every time they walk into your house.

---

## 📦 Features
* **Total Overhaul:** Every single painting in the game is replaced with Tackle4826 meme art!
* **Pure Meme Energy:** From classic faces to chaotic drawings — 100% pure happiness.
* **Compatibility:** Works flawlessly on **Minecraft 1.21.x** and is compatible with most other texture packs.
* **Lightweight:** Fast to load and won't lag your game.

---

## 📸 Media
![Tackle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b3d17df579e17feca69139135f355f5998e95e3.png)

---

## 🛠️ Installation
1.  Download the **.zip** file.
2.  Open your Minecraft folder and navigate to `resourcepacks`.
3.  Drop the downloaded **.zip** file into the folder.
4.  In-game, go to **Options** > **Resource Packs** and move it to the active side.
5.  Enjoy the chaos!

---

## ⚠️ Important Note
* This pack is made **just for fun** and does not change gameplay mechanics.
* All images are used for meme and entertainment purposes only.
* Respect to the legend, Tackle4826!

---

## 👥 Credits
* **Pack Created by:** Tonlocalbytes
* **Inspiration & Assets:** Tackle4826 (Legendary Thai Minecraft YouTuber)

---
*Enjoy spreading the Tackle4826 meme spirit across your world! 😎*
